name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo apt install -y poppler-utils tesseract-ocr && export PATH=/usr/bin:$PATH && echo 'export PATH=/usr/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; pip3 install --user streamlit; echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'
